note: static/curated; a future `boruna` subcommand should generate this from the compiled toolchain to prevent drift
description: Deterministic execution platform for enterprise AI/LLM-agent workflows. Local engine + CLI only (no server/coordinator/web UI).

language.name: ax
language.enum_variants: unit or single-payload; construct via Enum::Variant or Enum::Variant(payload)

capabilities.name: net.fetch
capabilities.effect: HTTP requests to external APIs / webhooks

capabilities.name: step.input
capabilities.effect: Read a workflow step's resolved inputs

stdlib.name: std-ui
stdlib.purpose: Declarative UI primitives for framework apps

stdlib.name: std-forms
stdlib.purpose: Model-driven form engine with validation and state tracking

stdlib.name: std-authz
stdlib.purpose: Role and permission enforcement via policies

stdlib.name: std-sync
stdlib.purpose: Offline queue and conflict resolution helpers

stdlib.name: std-testing
stdlib.purpose: High-level test helpers for framework apps

stdlib.name: std-llm
stdlib.purpose: Typed LLM effect wrappers for prompting and structured generation

stdlib.name: std-json
stdlib.purpose: JSON-flavoured data extraction and manipulation utilities

templates.name: crud-admin
templates.purpose: Full CRUD admin panel with authz guards, db effects, form validation

templates.name: form-basic
templates.purpose: Simple validated form with field binding and submission

templates.name: realtime-feed
templates.purpose: Live event feed with polling, rate limiting, and notifications

templates.name: offline-sync
templates.purpose: Offline-first app with sync queue and conflict resolution

tools.name: boruna_compile
tools.description: Compile .ax source -> module info or structured errors

tools.name: boruna_check
tools.description: Run diagnostics -> severity, spans, suggested patches

tools.name: boruna_framework_test
tools.description: Run a framework app through a message sequence

tools.name: boruna_workflow_validate
tools.description: Validate workflow DAG structure + topological order

tools.name: boruna_template_apply
tools.description: Apply a template with variable substitution

tools.name: boruna_capability_list
tools.description: Report the capability-set identity hash for .ax source

tools.name: boruna_symbols
tools.description: Extract the symbol table (functions, types, capabilities) from .ax source (added this session)
